summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KORKMAN2 driving report application. Found critical bug with page refresh creating new reports instead of using existing ones. Backend APIs working correctly, most frontend functionality operational.

minor_issues.issue: Multiple reports created for same date due to frontend initReport logic
minor_issues.impact: Data integrity - old tours get lost on page refresh

critical_bugs.issue: Page refresh creates new report instead of using existing report for the day
critical_bugs.impact: Tours disappear when user refreshes page - major data loss

ui_bugs.issue: Green background only appears when complete button is clicked, not when weight is added automatically
ui_bugs.impact: User cannot visually identify completed tours unless they click complete button

passed_tests: Tour completion via complete button shows green background

action_item_for_main_agent.critical: Fix initReport function to prevent creating new reports on page refresh - implement proper existing report detection and usage
action_item_for_main_agent.high: Fix tour completion visual feedback to show green background when weight is automatically added
action_item_for_main_agent.medium: Clean up existing duplicate reports in database for the same date

success_percentage.frontend: 75% - Major functionality works but critical page refresh bug exists
